flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Carteret Community College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (12.7% → 9.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carteret Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (13.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Carteret Community College fell 50% between 2013 and 2016 ($7.0k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carteret Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $2.3k).
